phrases.intent_en: Where is the queue for a table
phrases.cultural_note: At busy times, you wait at the host stand to be seated, especially for the main dining area.

likely_response.translation_en: At the hostess stand right by the entrance.

responses.english: At the hostess stand right by the entrance.

phrases.intent_en: Is the open kitchen visible from communal tables
phrases.text_local: Je z velkých společných stolů vidět do otevřené kuchyně?
phrases.cultural_note: The open kitchen is a feature of the main room, allowing guests to watch the cooks.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, you can see it from here.

responses.english: Yes, you can see it from here.

phrases.intent_en: Do I order drinks at the bar or table
phrases.text_local: Objednávám pití u baru nebo u stolu?
phrases.cultural_note: In many Czech pubs, especially those serving tank beer, you order drinks at the bar from the tapster (výčepní).

likely_response.local: Pivo a pití si objednáte přímo na baru.
likely_response.translation_en: You order beer and drinks directly at the bar.

responses.english: You order beer and drinks directly at the bar.
responses.local: Pivo a pití si objednáte přímo na baru.
